name: Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients into a crockpot.
2. If you prefer, chop the onion before adding it; my boyfriend dislikes onions, so I leave them whole to maintain flavor but can remove them later.
3. Fill the remaining space in the pot with water and stir.
4. Turn on high heat and let cook for 6 to 8 hours.
